$comment: Generated from July 2026 deep-dive research. Prices are DELAYED/APPROXIMATE snapshots at research date - never treat as live. tradeable_on_scarlett=true only for coins on CoinSpot's public AUD order-book latest-prices feed (~17 markets) that paperEngine.ts can currently price. All others require a new price source (e.g. CoinGecko) before any strategy can trade them.
price_feed_limitation: CoinSpot public latest-prices endpoint returns ~17 AUD order-book markets only. Instant-buy-only coins are NOT priceable by the engine.

core_watchlist.name: Hyperliquid
core_watchlist.note: CFTC review = single point of failure

core_watchlist.name: Bittensor
core_watchlist.note: 25% crash on single subnet exit Apr 2026

core_watchlist.name: Kaspa
core_watchlist.note: Toccata fired Jun 30, price didn't care; watch GitHub dev traction

core_watchlist.name: Ethena
core_watchlist.note: Best news produced only 5-12% pop = structural cap

core_watchlist.name: Injective
core_watchlist.catalyst: Jul 16 DC summit (fired); Vulcan upgrade live

core_watchlist.name: Chainlink
core_watchlist.catalyst: DTCC Collateral AppChain Q4 2026; SWIFT pre-prod -> live

core_watchlist.name: Ripple
core_watchlist.catalyst: CLARITY Act Senate vote late-Jul/Aug 2026 (Polymarket ~62%); Fed master account

core_watchlist.name: Jupiter
core_watchlist.catalyst: SOL catalysts flow through; buyback expansion; unlocks completed 2026
core_watchlist.note: Leveraged SOL beta - correlated with SOL position, adds beta not diversification. ~72% supply in top-10 wallets

core_watchlist.name: Ethereum
core_watchlist.catalyst: Glamsterdam Q3 2026 (gas 60M->200M, ePBS); staking ETFs (BlackRock $100M day one)
core_watchlist.note: L2s broke deflationary thesis; safest floor, lowest surge

up_and_comers.name: io.net
up_and_comers.catalyst: IDE burn engine (12M tokens/12mo) vs July unlock
up_and_comers.key_risk: unlocks vs burns; no moat vs AWS/CoreWeave

up_and_comers.name: Monad
up_and_comers.key_risk: 30%+ supply unlocks in 2026; incentive-driven TVL; Hayes structural-sell-pressure thesis

up_and_comers.name: Plume Network
up_and_comers.catalyst: Converting SEC transfer-agent license to live issuance; Season 2 airdrop closes Aug 2026
up_and_comers.contracts: Apollo $50M; 14 WisdomTree funds; Etherfi $25M live/$100M planned; Binance Wallet $1.17B vault distribution
up_and_comers.key_risk: value-capture curse; does RWA need its own chain?
up_and_comers.note: Best business case + cleanest float of crypto up-and-comers. $645M AUM on-chain vs $115M FDV

up_and_comers.name: Aster
up_and_comers.catalyst: Volume-share re-flip vs Hyperliquid; CZ/YZi promotion
up_and_comers.contracts: none - fee revenue collapsed when incentives tapered (70% share -> ~10-18%)
up_and_comers.key_risk: already peaked ($0.08->$1.97->fade); 1001x leverage casino mechanics; patronage structure

up_and_comers.name: Falcon Finance
up_and_comers.catalyst: fUSD via Anchorage Digital Bank (GENIUS-Act ready); $50M builder fund
up_and_comers.contracts: USDf $1.5-1.62B supply at ~110% backing; Anchorage issuance
up_and_comers.key_risk: peg fragility (multi-collateral widens failure surface) + DWF-linked founder + 77% supply locked + $10M insurance vs $1.6B liabilities (0.6%)

up_and_comers.name: Kaito
up_and_comers.catalyst: Polymarket Attention Markets; project Yaps campaigns
up_and_comers.contracts: recurring paid campaigns across token launches (SaaS-like revenue)
up_and_comers.key_risk: attention economy gameable/cyclical; team unlock Feb 2026-2029 (250M tokens)
up_and_comers.note: Only crypto up-and-comer that invoices customers

cross_cutting_findings: 8 of 12 core coins share strong-institutional-adoption / weak-token-value-capture (TAO, ONDO, ENA, RNDR, LINK, XRP most acute)
Names where usage mechanically buys the token (HYPE, JUP, ETH, INJ) are structurally better positioned
Every crypto up-and-comer carries a token-unlock/dilution overhang worse than the large-caps
JUP is leveraged SOL beta - holding both doubles the same bet
CoinSpot instant-buy spreads (1-3%) materially erode small-cap returns even on winning trades
engine_todo: To trade non-feed coins, add a CoinGecko price adapter alongside netlify/functions/lib/coinspot.ts and have paperEngine.ts fall back to it for symbols absent from the CoinSpot AUD order-book feed. Until then strategies must filter to tradeable_on_scarlett=true.
